item.title: Why Digital Twins Are Rewiring Industry 4.0
item.description: Beyond CAD Models There is a project by Dassault Systèmes called the Living Heart that illustrates the trajectory of this technology. Instead of relying on standard 2D scans, surgeons can pull up a 3D model of a patient’s heart that simulates blood flow, mechanics, and electricity based on real patient data. It allows doctors to test therapeutic interventions before surgery begins. This highlights what a modern digital twin looks like in practice.
